mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox_messages (event_id, event_type, aggregate_id, schema_version, payload, status, occurred_at) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{eventType}, #{aggregateId}, #{schemaVersion}, #{payload}, #{status}, #{occurredAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outbox_messages WHERE event_type = #{eventType}

SELECT id, event_id AS eventId, event_type AS eventType, aggregate_id AS aggregateId, schema_version AS schemaVersion, payload, status, occurred_at AS occurredAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM outbox_messages WHERE aggregate_id = #{aggregateId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, event_id AS eventId, event_type AS eventType, aggregate_id AS aggregateId, schema_version AS schemaVersion, payload, status, occurred_at AS occurredAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM outbox_messages WHERE status = 'PENDING' OR (status = 'PUBLISHING' AND lock_until < UTC_TIMESTAMP()) ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 100
